name: ExtensionSupplyRequest_DeliverFor
title: R5: The patient for who the supply request is for (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SupplyRequest.deliverFor` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` has a context of SupplyRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SupplyRequest`.
Element `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The patient for who the supply request is for (new)
element.comment:
Element `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` has a context of SupplyRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SupplyRequest`.
Element `SupplyRequest.deliverFor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The patient for who the supply request is for
element.definition: The patient to whom the supply will be given or for whom they will be used.
